mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates lower discount rates applied to future corporate cash flows, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or positive returns occur in less than 55 percent of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate increase exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that trigger immediate equity sell-offs over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in more than 60 percent of triggered instances or t-statistic for return difference is insignificant at 95 percent confidence.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates robust aggregate demand that supports corporate earnings growth and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of cases or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during periods of high inflation indicates supply constraints that erode profit margins and generate negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Negative returns fail to materialize in more than 60 percent of declining production months within the specified regime or IC decays below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate level exceeding 4.5 percent triggers risk-off positioning as borrowing costs constrain corporate leverage, producing negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in more than 58 percent of triggered observations or signal loses predictive power after 2007.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity that boosts corporate revenues and generates positive equity returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows or positive returns occur in less than 55 percent of positive payroll growth months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising real GDP and falling real personal consumption expenditures signals weakening household demand that precedes corporate earnings downgrades and negative equity returns over one month.
failure_condition: Divergence signals yield positive 20-day returns in more than 60 percent of cases or interaction effect is statistically insignificant in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production during low-inflation periods indicates improving supply chain efficiency that lifts equity valuations over the next five trading days.
failure_condition: Positive returns fail to materialize in more than 55 percent of triggered instances or signal IC drops below 0.01 in out-of-sample validation.
